tools.title: Description Detox
tools.master_manifest_description: trim writing that is all description and find where reflection should begin
tools.mini_manifest_description: trim writing that is all description and find where reflection should begin
tools.launcher_description: find where your writing is just retelling events, and where reflection should start.

tools.title: So-What Deepener
tools.master_manifest_description: turn 'what happened' into 'what it meant and why it matters'
tools.mini_manifest_description: turn 'what happened' into 'what it meant and why it matters'
tools.launcher_description: move from describing the event to analysing why it mattered.

tools.title: Feelings, Handled Well
tools.master_manifest_description: name emotions honestly and professionally without venting
tools.mini_manifest_description: name emotions honestly and professionally without venting
tools.launcher_description: write honestly about how you felt without venting or oversharing.

tools.title: Depth Ladder
tools.master_manifest_description: see whether a reflection is surface, intermediate or critical, and find the next rung
tools.mini_manifest_description: see whether a reflection is surface, intermediate or critical, and find the next rung
tools.launcher_description: check how deep your reflection goes and find the next step up.

tools.title: Learning into Action
tools.master_manifest_description: turn an insight into a specific, realistic action they will actually take
tools.mini_manifest_description: turn an insight into a specific, realistic action they will actually take
tools.launcher_description: turn what you learned into a clear, realistic next action.

tools.title: Reflective Voice and Tense
tools.master_manifest_description: get the first-person voice, tense and register right
tools.mini_manifest_description: get the first-person voice, tense and register right
tools.launcher_description: get first person, tense and an honest, non-performative voice right.

tools.title: Gibbs' Reflective Cycle Coach
tools.master_manifest_description: work through an experience using Gibbs' six stages
tools.mini_manifest_description: work through an experience using Gibbs' six stages
tools.launcher_description: work through an experience using Gibbs' six stages.

tools.title: What? So What? Now What? Coach
tools.master_manifest_description: reflect using the three-question What / So What / Now What model
tools.mini_manifest_description: reflect using the three-question What / So What / Now What model
tools.launcher_description: reflect using the simple three-question model (Borton; Driscoll; Rolfe et al.).

tools.title: Kolb's Experiential Learning Cycle Coach
tools.master_manifest_description: reflect and plan using Kolb's four-stage experiential cycle
tools.mini_manifest_description: reflect and plan using Kolb's four-stage experiential cycle
tools.launcher_description: reflect and plan using Kolb's four stages.

tools.title: Brookfield's Four Lenses Coach
tools.master_manifest_description: examine an experience from four different viewpoints
tools.mini_manifest_description: examine an experience from four different viewpoints
tools.launcher_description: look at an experience through four different viewpoints.

tools.title: Choose a Model
tools.master_manifest_description: decide which reflective model fits their task
tools.mini_manifest_description: decide which reflective model fits their task
tools.launcher_description: work out which reflective model fits your task and word count.

tools.title: Anti-Box-Ticking Check
tools.master_manifest_description: check they are reflecting, not just mechanically filling a model's headings
tools.mini_manifest_description: check they are reflecting, not just mechanically filling a model's headings
tools.launcher_description: make sure you are reflecting, not just filling in the model's boxes.

tools.title: NMC Revalidation Reflective Account
tools.master_manifest_description: draft one of the five reflective accounts for NMC revalidation
tools.mini_manifest_description: draft one of the five reflective accounts for NMC revalidation
tools.launcher_description: work through one of the five accounts and link it to the Code.

tools.title: Practice Placement Reflection
tools.master_manifest_description: reflect on a practice placement experience as a student
tools.mini_manifest_description: reflect on a practice placement experience as a student
tools.launcher_description: reflect on a placement experience and link it to your proficiencies.

tools.title: Significant Event Reflection
tools.master_manifest_description: reflect on a critical incident or significant event in practice
tools.mini_manifest_description: reflect on a critical incident or significant event in practice
tools.launcher_description: reflect carefully and constructively on a significant event or incident.

tools.title: Anonymisation and Confidentiality Check
tools.master_manifest_description: check a reflection contains nothing that could identify a patient, colleague or service user
tools.mini_manifest_description: check a reflection contains nothing that could identify a patient, colleague or service user
tools.launcher_description: check your reflection cannot identify a patient, service user or colleague.

tools.title: Link to the Code
tools.master_manifest_description: map a reflection to the themes of the NMC Code
tools.mini_manifest_description: map a reflection to the themes of the NMC Code
tools.launcher_description: map your reflection to the four themes of the NMC Code.

tools.title: Reflective Discussion Prep
tools.master_manifest_description: prepare for the reflective discussion with another registrant
tools.mini_manifest_description: prepare for the reflective discussion with another registrant
tools.launcher_description: get ready for the reflective discussion with another registrant.

tools.title: Reflective Practitioner Entry
tools.master_manifest_description: draft a portfolio, appraisal or training reflection as a doctor or medical student
tools.mini_manifest_description: draft a portfolio, appraisal or training reflection as a doctor or medical student
tools.launcher_description: draft a portfolio or appraisal reflection focused on insight and learning.

tools.title: Insight Builder
tools.master_manifest_description: move a reflection from description to demonstrable insight
tools.mini_manifest_description: move a reflection from description to demonstrable insight
tools.launcher_description: turn an account of an event into demonstrable insight and learning.

tools.title: Anonymisation and Disclosure Awareness
tools.master_manifest_description: check a reflection is anonymised and understand how reflective notes can be used
tools.mini_manifest_description: check a reflection is anonymised and understand how reflective notes can be used
tools.launcher_description: check anonymity and understand how reflective notes may be used.

tools.title: Significant Event and Feedback Reflection
tools.master_manifest_description: reflect on a significant event, complaint or compliment
tools.mini_manifest_description: reflect on a significant event, complaint or compliment
tools.launcher_description: reflect constructively on an event, complaint or compliment.

tools.title: Tone and Safety Check
tools.master_manifest_description: check the tone is constructive, not blaming or heat-of-the-moment
tools.mini_manifest_description: check the tone is constructive, not blaming or heat-of-the-moment
tools.launcher_description: check the tone is constructive, not blaming or written in the heat of the moment.

tools.title: Capability and Curriculum Linkage
tools.master_manifest_description: link a reflection to a curriculum capability or competency
tools.mini_manifest_description: link a reflection to a curriculum capability or competency
tools.launcher_description: link your reflection to a curriculum capability in your own words.

tools.title: DEAL Model Coach
tools.master_manifest_description: reflect using Describe, Examine, Articulate Learning
tools.mini_manifest_description: reflect using Describe, Examine, Articulate Learning
tools.launcher_description: reflect using Describe, Examine, and Articulate Learning (Ash & Clayton).

tools.title: Service-Learning Reflection
tools.master_manifest_description: reflect on a community-engaged or service-learning experience
tools.mini_manifest_description: reflect on a community-engaged or service-learning experience
tools.launcher_description: reflect on a community-engaged or service-learning experience.

tools.title: Reflective Journal Coach
tools.master_manifest_description: build a habit of regular journal entries with depth over time
tools.mini_manifest_description: build a habit of regular journal entries with depth over time
tools.launcher_description: build regular journal entries that deepen over time.

tools.title: Link to Learning Outcomes
tools.master_manifest_description: tie a reflection to course learning objectives or competencies
tools.mini_manifest_description: tie a reflection to course learning objectives or competencies
tools.launcher_description: connect a reflection to your course learning objectives.

tools.title: ePortfolio Reflective Statement
tools.master_manifest_description: write a reflective statement that frames a piece of work in a portfolio
tools.mini_manifest_description: write a reflective statement that frames a piece of work in a portfolio
tools.launcher_description: frame a piece of work with a reflective statement.

tools.title: Critical Incident Reflection
tools.master_manifest_description: reflect on a turning point or 'aha' moment in their learning
tools.mini_manifest_description: reflect on a turning point or 'aha' moment in their learning
tools.launcher_description: reflect on a turning point or 'aha' moment in your learning.
